## How to Test

- Run `npm install`
- Run `npm start`
- Navigate to affected areas of the application
- Verify there are no console errors or warnings

---

## Checklist

- Code follows existing project structure and conventions
- No debug code or console logs left in
- Components are reusable where appropriate
- UI changes are consistent with existing design patterns
- No breaking changes introduced
- All tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- Application builds successfully (`npm run build`)
